description:
Adds R13verGrrl (Anatolian frontier merc) as a hireable hero pilot in MechWarrior 5: Mercenaries.

Personality: strong-willed, kind, sharp humor, a little clumsy. Loves cars and cats.

Custom portrait, hire-screen greeting and mission/combat callouts in a Turkish/English mix (with real cat cameos in the background — a running joke).

Available for hire after completing any single mission.

Status: scaffold — content in progress. See https://github.com/gitpush-mod/mw5-r13vergrrl for source and progress.
author: Chris Carpenter
